name: Seed Export Compliance Agent
summary: A Task-agent example: an AI Agent queries a database, calls a GraphQL API, computes a score via REST, and sends a REST notification.
description: A small, self-contained Camunda 8 example illustrating the Task agent pattern (https://camunda.com/orchestrate/agents/). An AI Agent is given four tools - one per 'queries databases / calls APIs / updates records / sends communications' bullet - each hitting a real, live, public, keyless service. No mocks, no signups beyond the LLM key (and none at all on Camunda SaaS, which uses the zero-config Camunda-provided LLM).

saas.notes: CAMUNDA_PROVIDED_LLM_API_ENDPOINT and CAMUNDA_PROVIDED_LLM_API_KEY are pre-populated automatically on Camunda SaaS trial / AI-features-enabled clusters. No manual configuration needed.

required.name: CAMUNDA_PROVIDED_LLM_API_ENDPOINT
required.description: Endpoint for the OpenAI-compatible LLM provider used by the AI Agent connector (for local/self-managed setups, e.g. Ollama).

required.name: CAMUNDA_PROVIDED_LLM_API_KEY
required.description: API key for the configured OpenAI-compatible LLM provider.

required.name: CAMUNDA_PROVIDED_LLM_DEFAULT_MODEL
required.description: Model name used by the AI Agent connector.

selfManaged.notes: For Camunda 8 Run / Self-Managed, configure these three values to point to your local or hosted OpenAI-compatible LLM provider.

externalServices.name: UCSC public MySQL (hg38)
externalServices.etiquette: single indexed LIMIT 1 lookup per run - do not loop or load-test

externalServices.name: math.js API
externalServices.notes: used as a stand-in for a legacy scoring engine

externalServices.name: httpbin echo
externalServices.notes: swap for a fresh https://webhook.site/<uuid> URL to watch the notification land live

sampleVariables.shipmentNotes: Shipment SHIP-2026-0731: seed stock ready for export to Brazil. Lab reference marker on the paperwork is TP53.

run.expectedOutcome: The agent calls verify_genetic_marker, check_destination_country, and compute_compliance_score as needed, then records its clearance decision. A deterministic gateway then either calls notify_export_team automatically (cleared) or routes to a human 'Clarify compliance issues' task (flagged-for-review), visible end-to-end in Operate.
